summary: Frontend testing of: (1) ZoneCategoryManager rebuild in /admin#categories - CategoryCard with ZonePreview SVG, dialog with pattern section, stats row. (2) FloatingStyleButton pattern section in /daily-sessions map. Fixed a critical click-bubbling bug that prevented pattern grid from being shown in the floating style popover.

critical_bug_fixed.issue: FloatingToolbar div had onMouseDown/onTouchStart stopPropagation but was missing onClick stopPropagation. React synthetic events from Radix Popover (portal) bubble through the React component tree. When user clicked float-toggle-pattern or any button inside the PopoverContent, the click event bubbled up through the React tree to the map container's handleClick, which called setSelectedZoneId(null) (since the click position was outside any zone polygon), unmounting the FloatingToolbar and closing the popover. This prevented any interaction with the pattern section.
critical_bug_fixed.fix: Added onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} to (1) the FloatingToolbar outer div (line 256) and (2) the PopoverContent component (line 71 area). This matches the already-present onMouseDown stopPropagation pattern.

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fixed: React portal click-bubbling issue in FloatingToolbar - was causing zone deselection when clicking any button inside the Popover. Fix: added onClick stopPropagation to FloatingToolbar div and PopoverContent.
ZoneCategoryManager is clean and well-structured. CategoryCard uses ZonePreview SVG polygon correctly with pattern support.
PATTERN_TYPES has exactly 12 entries matching the grid count in both dialog and floating popover.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 9 test cases passed after bug fix)

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 15 zone categories, جولة الأربعاء 4 مارس 2026 (60 zones, draft status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZoneCategoryManager fully functional with 15 categories. Stats show (total/pattern/active). Add Category dialog has ZonePreview, color section, and toggle-pattern-section with 12 patterns. FloatingStyleButton in /daily-sessions map now correctly shows pattern grid after onClick stopPropagation fix. All features working: category cards with SVG polygon ZonePreview, admin dialog with 12-pattern grid, floating style popover with pattern section.
rca_of_the_issue: React synthetic events from Radix UI Popover (which renders via createPortal) bubble through the React component tree, not the DOM tree. The FloatingToolbar had stopPropagation for mouseDown/touchStart but not for click. Clicking inside the Popover caused a synthetic click event to bubble up: Popover button → FloatingStyleButton → FloatingToolbar → MapCanvas container → handleClick. The handleClick called getMousePercent(e) with the popover button's position, which was outside all zone polygons, so setSelectedZoneId(null) was called, unmounting the FloatingToolbar and its Popover. Fix: add onClick stopPropagation to FloatingToolbar div and PopoverContent.
